description: Hardware/material library, seeded with the DABJ course book Section 9 validation case only (Phase 2.2). JSON has no comments; each entry's 'source' field records provenance: DABJ-cited values vs standard handbook fills.

materials.source: Ftu/Fty/Fsu: DABJ Sec. 9 + Appendix B Design Tables (A-286, 160 ksi). E and CTE: standard fill, not from DABJ (typical handbook values for A-286).

Standard fill, not from DABJ. DABJ Sec. 9 says only 'aluminum alloy' joint members and works no member-strength margins; 7075-T7351 seeded as a representative alloy with typical handbook values (Fbru/Fbry at e/D = 2).

bolts.source: Standard 3/8-24 UNF thread geometry (At = 0.0878 in^2, minor dia 0.3209 in, basic pitch dia E = 0.3479 in). Note: DABJ Appendix B Design Tables list At = 0.0951 for 3/8 because they assume UNJF threads; the standard UNF value is used here. The DABJ Sec. 9 margins use spec allowable loads and full-diameter shear area, so this difference does not affect the Sec. 9 answers.

boltSpecs.source: DABJ Sec. 9 (Ptu-allow = 15,200 lb given; Pty-allow = 11,400 lb per Problem 9-4, Eq. 18) and Appendix B Design Tables, 3/8 row.
